entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The primary crop evaluated for stover quality and yield, including improved cultivars CSH 16, CSV 15, PSV 16, S 35 and traditional yellow sorghum

entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: A crop intercropped with traditional yellow sorghum in a 5:1 row ratio

entities.name: STOVER NITROGEN DRY MATTER
entities.description: A quality trait of sorghum stover measured in the study

entities.name: CRUDE PROTEIN
entities.description: A quality trait of sorghum stover measured in the study

entities.name: IN VITRO DIGESTIBILITY
entities.description: A quality trait of sorghum stover measuring the ease of digestion

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of grain produced by the sorghum cultivars

entities.name: FODDER YIELD
entities.description: The quantity of fodder produced by the sorghum cultivars

entities.name: STOVER NITROGEN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of nitrogen present in the sorghum stover

entities.name: STOVER NUTRITIVE VALUE
entities.description: The overall nutritional quality of the sorghum stover

entities.name: BLACK SOIL
entities.description: One of the soil types used for planting sorghum

entities.name: BARKA SOIL
entities.description: Light black soil characterized by low fertility and low moisture retention capacity

entities.name: CHALKA SOIL
entities.description: Red soil characterized by large pebbles and low fertility

entities.name: RED SOIL
entities.description: One of the soil types used for planting sorghum

entities.name: GENETIC COMPONENT
entities.description: The hereditary factor influencing the variation of stover traits among cultivars

entities.name: GENOTYPE X SOIL TYPE INTERACTION
entities.description: The combined effect of the cultivar's genetics and the soil environment on trait expression

entities.name: WIDE ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of a cultivar to maintain performance across diverse environments

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing specific traits through breeding or genetic selection

entities.name: MAHABUBNAGAR
entities.description: A district in Andhra Pradesh, India where the study was conducted

entities.name: RANGA REDDY
entities.description: A district in Andhra Pradesh, India where the study was conducted

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: The state in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted
